seoTitle: Conara vs Connellys Marsh — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Conara and Connellys Marsh. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Conara vs Connellys Marsh: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Conara and Connellys Marsh.
heading: Conara vs Connellys Marsh — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Conara, Tasmania and Connellys Marsh, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Conara has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Connellys Marsh (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Conara or Connellys Marsh safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Conara has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Connellys Marsh scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Conara scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Connellys Marsh scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Conara or Connellys Marsh?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Conara has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.17% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
